# style-mode-shadow



<!-- Auto Generated Below -->


## Overview

Tests style modes with shadow DOM.
Mode 'buford' = yellow background
Mode 'griff' = red background

## Properties

| Property | Attribute | Description    | Type                  | Default     |
| -------- | --------- | -------------- | --------------------- | ----------- |
| `mode`   | `mode`    | The style mode | `'buford' \| 'griff'` | `undefined` |
